zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强但仍受均线压制
zh.content:
AVAX/USD当前围绕8.11美元运行，24小时小幅上涨1.91%，且价格接近日内高点，显示买盘仍有延续。整体结构偏向震荡反弹，但尚未摆脱弱势整理区间，趋势上仍需观察能否有效站稳8.20美元上方。

从技术指标看，价格低于SMA(20)的8.20874，说明中短期均线压力仍在。MACD为-0.0943，虽未给出信号线，但负值表明动能仍偏弱，反弹更多属于修复行情而非强趋势启动。若后续MACD收敛并翻正，才可能强化上行确认。

支撑位先看8.00美元整数关口，其次是7.93美元附近的日内低点区域；若失守，回调空间可能进一步打开。上方阻力集中在8.21美元均线位，突破后可关注8.30至8.40美元区间，那里将决定短线反转力度。

操作上建议以区间思路应对，激进者可在8.00美元上方分批试多，止损放在7.93美元下方；稳健者等待放量站上8.21美元再跟进。若价格反复受阻于均线且MACD继续走弱，则应以高抛低吸或观望为主。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is showing a modest short-term rebound, but the broader structure still looks cautious. The latest price of 8.113 sits just below the 20-period SMA at 8.20874, which suggests the pair has not yet reclaimed a stronger bullish posture. With the 24-hour gain at 1.91%, buyers are attempting to stabilize the market after recent weakness, but momentum remains limited and the move still looks more corrective than decisive.

The MACD reading of -0.0943 confirms that downward momentum has not fully reversed. Although the histogram is not provided, a negative MACD typically implies bearish pressure is still present unless it starts converging toward the signal line. RSI is unavailable, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be confirmed. Even so, the current price near the session high of 8.1149 indicates buyers are active, but follow-through will be important.

Immediate support appears around 7.93, the reported low, with a more meaningful downside cushion likely near the psychological 7.80 area if selling resumes. On the upside, the first resistance is the 20-day SMA at 8.21, followed by the next psychological zone near 8.30. A sustained move above 8.21 would improve the technical picture and could attract short-term momentum traders looking for a recovery continuation.

For traders, a cautious approach is appropriate. Aggressive buyers may consider scaling in near support only if price holds above 7.93 with clear stabilization, while conservative traders may wait for a clean breakout above 8.21 to confirm strength. If AVAX fails to hold current levels and slips back below 7.93, momentum could weaken quickly. Overall, the setup is neutral-to-slightly bearish, with short-term recovery potential but no confirmed trend reversal yet.
